final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing editorial photo of Korean café-style fashionable coffee and desserts with hand-drawn white-pen annotations overlaid, intended for Instagram Stories sharing. No people.

Style/medium: smartphone-shot aesthetic, Korean café flat-lay or lifestyle photo with hand-drawn annotation overlay; Instagram Stories / magazine rough-notes style; fashionable yet casual
Composition: café table scene with coffee and desserts as hero subjects, negative space preserved around each element to allow annotation breathing room; sight-lines guided by arrows and dashed lines drawn in white
Subject: Korean café-style coffee drink and assorted desserts/sweets — no people present; each element circled or outlined with white hand-drawn contour lines as if tracing the object's perimeter
Scene/backdrop: Korean café interior or clean café table surface, soft and warm
Lighting/mood: soft natural window light, warm and relaxed; gentle highlights suggesting a cozy café afternoon
Color palette: warm neutrals, creamy whites, soft browns — Korean café tonal palette
Materials/textures: smooth ceramic cups, plated desserts; annotation layer uses thin white pen strokes, slightly uneven, single-stroke rough quality
Text (verbatim): hand-drawn Japanese handwriting annotations (7 parts hiragana, 3 parts simple kanji), short diary-voice murmurs placed near each element —
  • near drink: 「やさしい甘さ♡」with steam doodles rising from cup
  • near dessert: 「しっとり、最高…✨」with sparkle marks
  • near overall scene: 「しあわせすぎた〜」as a one-line summary with small heart
  • near space/atmosphere: 「ゆったりした時間」with a tiny smiley
  arrows (→) and dashed lines (- - -) connecting annotations to their subjects; small decorative elements: steam wisps, ✦ sparkles, ♡ hearts, tiny emoji-style faces — used sparingly
Constraints: white pen annotation style must look hand-drawn, single-stroke, slightly rough and uneven; no people or human figures; preserve visual breathing room / blank space between annotations; do not over-decorate
Avoid: typed or printed font appearance for annotations, crowded layout with no negative space, Western café aesthetic, dark or moody lighting, any human figures
